resolution: Replaced per-evaluation full case cloning in the ORPD hot loop with a thread-local reusable decode workspace that resets only controlled mutable arrays; scenario application can reuse already-owned cases.
ConstraintViolation now carries the configured feasibility tolerance instead of using an independent hard-coded threshold.
Added a pre-allocation dense-Torch bus-count safety ceiling and a sparse CPU-reference fallback for larger cases, preventing uncontrolled O(n^2) dense accelerator allocation.
L-index calculation now validates partition dimensions, voltage length, and bus identity/order before indexing.
Dense Newton fallback is bounded by a bus-count ceiling and refuses unsafe O(n^2) allocations with an explicit diagnostic.
Vectorized branch-angle constraint mapping/evaluation, including vectorized bus-number lookup, removing the Python branch loop from the hot path.
Separated persistent RNG streams for historical pretraining and PPO minibatch shuffling; resume checkpoints preserve each stream state independently.
Friedman/evidence paths now convert all-tied or non-finite statistical outputs to a finite neutral/non-significant result with explicit status.

Narrowed accelerator throughput conversion/signature/synchronization exception handling; broad catches remain only at explicit fail-forward request/calibration boundaries where failures are propagated or recorded.
Resource/device probes now catch explicit expected exception classes and log device/path-specific warnings instead of silently swallowing broad failures.
Torch ORPD candidate conversion and parity-state handling now use narrow exception classes; unexpected runtime defects propagate instead of being masked.

The original finding is factually incorrect: Python except Exception does not catch KeyboardInterrupt or SystemExit. The independent-validation wrapper intentionally records ordinary validation failures explicitly, so no defect fix was required.
Experiment orchestration cleanup/profile/pool paths now use narrower expected exceptions and explicit warning/error reporting; top-level job wrappers remain structured failure boundaries.
Campaign ordering now uses updated_at DESC with deterministic id DESC as a secondary key.
Workspace restore now dispatches through semantic workspace keys/pages_by_key rather than brittle widget class-name strings.
ExperimentConfig.validate() is read-only; normalization is explicit through normalize_for_execution() and invalid run/evidence combinations raise instead of mutating silently.
Missing/unreadable/invalid case restoration now produces structured WorkspaceRestoreError diagnostics with experiment and stage context.
Removed the separate feasibility magic-number policy; ranking reads the carried configured tolerance through one canonical feasibility-rule implementation.
better() and sort_key() now use exactly the same deterministic feasibility-first ordering, eliminating inconsistent/non-transitive comparison semantics.
Policy network and policy broker globals are now bounded LRU caches; evicted broker resources are closed.
Sparse Jacobian construction catches the expected SciPy/runtime construction failure classes, logs the fallback, and applies the bounded dense-fallback safety ceiling.
Batched Newton now solves only active rows and scatters updates back, removing converged/inactive identity systems from linear solves.
Torch ORPD evaluation flattens compatible candidate x scenario work into cross-scenario batches and deterministically aggregates results back by candidate.
Removed locals() introspection for deployable_eligible and replaced it with an explicit tri-state variable and deterministic messaging.
Resume Center now dispatches supported experiment, policy-training, validation, and portfolio-export task types; Resume All reports deferred/unsupported work rather than silently ignoring it.
Results Explorer select_run() safely handles a run disappearing between refresh and selection and returns a failure status instead of raising uncaught KeyError.
Lazy AdaptiveComputeGovernor construction now receives the configured allocation_limit_fraction, matching the explicit initialization path.
Portfolio manifest loading now catches I/O/Unicode/JSON corruption and raises actionable validation errors; manifest object/artifact structure is checked.
ExperimentConfig.from_dict/load now reject unknown top-level and nested fields by default, exposing misspellings instead of silently discarding them.
Stopping an experiment preserves the existing verified_results count instead of resetting it to zero.
Real ORPD policy-development rollout loads ExperimentConfig once and caches immutable source case templates per rollout worker/chunk instead of reloading every episode.
Synthetic broker splits oversized single requests into deterministic chunks no larger than max_candidates before device allocation and recombines exact-order results.
Immutable curriculum/static tensors are cached in a bounded fingerprinted LRU instead of being restacked on every microbatch.
